text: Generate an OCaml project scaffold for sessy with dune, opam, and fixture directories.
Inspect the current repository tree and explain what is missing for the first vertical slice.
Commit the scaffold once dune build, dune exec, and fixture sanity checks all pass.
Compare the live Claude and Codex history formats before you write any adapter code.
Document the observed JSONL field names and keep the fixtures sanitized.
Prepare a dry-run launch command pipeline for sessy resume once the domain types exist.
